summary.zh-CN: 流式回复期间向上滚动后，视图会稳定停留在当前位置，不再被后续内容拉回底部。
summary.en-US: After scrolling up during a streaming reply, the view now stays in place instead of being pulled back to the bottom.

title.zh-CN: 流式回复可稳定退出自动贴底

body.zh-CN: 向上滚动超过 10px 后，即使回复继续增长，视图也会停留在当前位置；需要时可用回到底部按钮恢复贴底。
body.en-US: After scrolling more than 10px upward, the view remains in place as the reply grows; use the scroll-to-bottom button to resume following the latest message.

body.zh-CN: 现有 NPM 安装可以直接通过 stable 通道升级；本次不包含新的桌面安装包。
body.en-US: Existing npm installations can update through the stable channel; this release does not include a new desktop installer.
